Package com.university

Class User

java.lang.Object
com.university.User
All Implemented Interfaces:
NewsListener, Serializable, Comparable<User>
Direct Known Subclasses:
Employee, Student
public abstract class User extends Object implements Serializable, Comparable<User>, NewsListener
